title: Login & Basic Access
goal: Confirm you can reach the login node

procedures.text: SSH to login1.cognition.gla.alces.network and verify normal prompt

title: Home Directory & User Quota + Filesystem Experience
goal: Confirm you can reach the login node

procedures.text:
1. Run: quota
  2. Run: df -h ~
  3. Quick block + metadata test:
    time dd if=/dev/zero of=~/fs-test-file bs=1M count=50 conv=fdatasync && rm -f ~/fs-test-file
    time mkdir -p ~/fs-test-meta && for i in {1..100}; do touch ~/fs-test-meta/file$i; done && rm -rf ~/fs-test-meta

title: Scratch / Lustre Storage + Filesystem Experience
goal: Verify Lustre scratch and test real filesystem experience in personal dir

procedures.text:
1. Run: lfs quota /mnt/scratch/
  2. Run: ls /mnt/scratch/$USER
  3. Quick test:
    time dd if=/dev/zero of=/mnt/scratch/$USER/fs-test-file bs=1M count=50 conv=fdatasync && rm -f /mnt/scratch/$USER/fs-test-file
    time mkdir -p /mnt/scratch/$USER/fs-test-meta && for i in {1..100}; do touch /mnt/scratch/$USER/fs-test-meta/file$i; done && rm -rf /mnt/scratch/$USER/fs-test-meta

outcomes.good: Commands succeed, good performance, no errors
outcomes.bad: Filesystem issues or very slow performance

title: Slurm Scheduler Status
goal: Confirm job scheduler and nodes are available

outcomes.good: Nodes in "idle/mixed/allocated" states. gpu-l40s and gpu-h100 visible
outcomes.bad: Many nodes down/drained or scheduler unresponsive

title: GPU / Compute Node Availability
goal: Quick check of the 16 GPU nodes

outcomes.bad: Large number of nodes missing or in bad states

title: Light Test Job Submission
goal: Verify you can submit and run jobs

procedures.text:
1. CPU test: srun --time=00:01:00 --nodes=1 --ntasks=1 echo "Test job OK on $(hostname)"
  2. Monitor: squeue -u $USER

outcomes.bad: Job fails to run or stays pending
Slurm commands fail or environment broken

title: Cleanup & Verification
goal: Ensure you have left the cluster clean

procedures.text:
1. squeue -u $USER
  2. Check and remove any leftover test files in ~ and /mnt/scratch/$USER
  3. Run: quota

outcomes.good: No running jobs, no temp files, quota back to normal
